title: Senior Software Engineer - Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
